title: bidens minor
intro: Bidens minor, also known as common beggar lilies or small beggar-ticks, is a perennial herbaceous plant that belongs to the daisy family (Asteraceae). This plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties, making it effective in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Bidens minor include its ability to alleviate symptoms of colds, flu, and other respiratory infections, as well as its potential to reduce inflammation and promote wound healing. Bidens minor is often prepared in herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed orally to harness its medicinal properties and health benefits.
